name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
administered_by: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA); credit guarantee support from CGTMSE
retrieval_text: Micro-credit facility for urban street vendors holding a Certificate of Vending or Letter of Recommendation from an Urban Local Body, offered in three progressive collateral-free tranches: Rs 15,000 for 1 year, Rs 25,000 for 2 years after timely repayment of the first, and Rs 50,000 for 3 years after timely repayment of the second. The central government provides a 7% per annum interest subsidy credited quarterly on regular repayment, plus monthly cashback of Rs 50-100 for digital transactions. No collateral is required beyond hypothecation of the assets financed.
